# LibreSynth mirror — please do not edit

This folder is created and maintained by **LibreSynth** to share the state of your
running patch with an AI assistant (through a filesystem tool).

**Do not edit, rename, or delete the files here by hand.** LibreSynth owns them and
rewrites them continuously while it is running — any manual change will be
overwritten and lost.

To change your patch, use LibreSynth itself. To turn this folder off, use the app's
menu: the hamburger button ▸ AI Mirror ▸ Turn mirror off, which empties it.

`AGENTS.md` in this folder explains what each file is, for the AI assistant.
